Key.German: VETERAN MOD ist ein modernes Schlachtfeld inklusive der realen Ausrüstung und Bewaffnung in der realen Umgebung.
Key.English: VETERAN MOD is a total modification, that includes real gear, equipment and armaments in the realistic environment.
Key.Italian: VETERAN MOD is a total modification, that includes real gear, equipment and armaments in the realistic environment.
Key.Spanish: VETERAN MOD is a total modification, that includes real gear, equipment and armaments in the realistic environment.
Key.French: VETERAN MOD is a total modification, that includes real gear, equipment and armaments in the realistic environment.
Key.Czech: VETERAN MOD is a total modification, that includes real gear, equipment and armaments in the realistic environment.
Key.Russian: ВЕТЕРАН МОД это тотальная модификация, которая включает в себя реальное снаряжение, оборудование и вооружение в реалистичном окружении.
Key.Polish: VETERAN MOD is a total modification, that includes real gear, equipment and armaments in the realistic environment.
Key.Hungarian: VETERAN MOD is a total modification, that includes real gear, equipment and armaments in the realistic environment.
